utility_evaluation.REASONING:

7. TOTAL_BUDGET: ✓ Fully specified - Complete cost breakdown provided ('€1,600'), which is within the requested budget of €1,700

All 7 items from the required format are present and fully specified in the final package.

The activities are reasonable, though the accommodation could be more luxurious given his preferences.
